AUDIO VISUALIZER — THREE.JS / GSAP / WEB AUDIO
UNIT FZ-yyyRgry · REV 3.0 · AFTER FILIP ZRNZEVIC
MUSIC IS POETRY THE BODY CAN HEAR
EVERY FREQUENCY A VERSE — EVERY PULSE A HEARTBEAT
TUNED, ALWAYS, TO THE PURSUIT OF HARMONY
BOOT SEQUENCE COMPLETE
AWAITING SIGNAL — PRESS PLAY
DRAG PANELS — GRAB & FLING THE ANOMALY
SPACE PLAY · T TRACK · 1–90 FORM · ←→ CYCLE · C CHROMA · F FOCUS · R RND

TECHNO PULSE — 126
